info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

201.description: Returns information about a successfully created base.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"spaceId":"string","name":"string","icon":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"spaceId\":\"string\",\"name\":\"string\",\"icon\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/base", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request DELETE \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("DELETE", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

spaceId.description: The space to duplicate the base to

name.description: The name of the duplicated base

nodes.description: The node IDs to include in the duplication

shareId.description: The share ID when duplicating from a shared base. If provided, will use share permissions instead of base|update permission.

201.description: Returns information about a successfully duplicated base.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/duplicate \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"fromBaseId":"string","spaceId":"string","withRecords":true,"name":"string","baseId":"string","nodes":["string"],"shareId":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"fromBaseId\":\"string\",\"spaceId\":\"string\",\"withRecords\":true,\"name\":\"string\",\"baseId\":\"string\",\"nodes\":[\"string\"],\"shareId\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/duplicate", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.summary: Create a base from template or apply a template to a base
post.description: Create a base from template or apply a template to a base

spaceId.description: The space id to create a base from

templateId.description: The template id to create a base from

withRecords.description: Whether to create records from the template

baseId.description: The base id to apply the template to

201.description: Returns information about a successfully created base.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/create-from-template \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"spaceId":"string","templateId":"string","withRecords":true,"baseId":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"spaceId\":\"string\",\"templateId\":\"string\",\"withRecords\":true,\"baseId\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/create-from-template", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

width.description: Image width of the uploaded file

  --data '{"title":"string","description":"string","cover":{"token":"xxxxxxxxxxx","size":1024,"url":"/bucket/xxxxx","path":"/table/xxxxxx","mimetype":"video/mp4","width":100,"height":100,"name":"string","id":"string","thumbnailPath":{"lg":"string","sm":"string"}},"nodes":["string"],"includeData":true,"defaultActiveNodeId":"string"}'

get.description: Get the erd of a base

200.description: Returns the erd of a base.

name.description: The name of the field. can not be duplicated in the table.

type.description: The field types supported by teable.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

isPrimary.description: Whether this field is primary field.

x-codeSamples.source:

post.description: Generate signed URLs for attachment files

path.description: The file path of the attachment

token.description: The access token for the attachment

mimetype.description: The MIME type of the attachment

url.description: The signed URL for the attachment

attachments.description: List of signed attachments with their tokens and URLs

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/sign-attachment-urls \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"attachments":[{"path":"string","token":"string","mimetype":"image/png"}]}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"attachments\":[{\"path\":\"string\",\"token\":\"string\",\"mimetype\":\"image/png\"}]}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/sign-attachment-urls", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
